channel.title: Portfolio Command Center — News Feed (Deprecated)
channel.description: This static RSS feed is no longer updated. The live news feed now runs inside the app — open the app and click the RSS button in the header to copy a current feed.

item.title: This feed is no longer updated — open the app for live news
item.description: Portfolio Command Center now generates RSS from your live portfolio inside the app. The static feed.xml at this URL is preserved for backwards compatibility but is intentionally a single deprecation notice. To get the current feed, open the app, click the RSS button in the top-right of the header, and Copy XML — that XML reflects your current tickers and their latest news from Finnhub.
